data.content:
This is an NUnit project running on VSTest. Use the `--filter` option with `ClassName`:

```
dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests
```

Or more precisely:

```
dotnet test --filter ClassName=Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests
```

Both work — the first does a substring match on the fully qualified name, the second matches the exact class. This will run only `ExportToCsv_ValidReport_CreatesFile` and `ExportToSharePoint_Authenticated_Uploads`.
